original_text:
### Brand Accent Shape (core container device)
- A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
- Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

relations.note: Defines the approved print geometry for the core accent-shape device.
Defines the email geometry and within-email orientation consistency for the core accent-shape device.
Charts and tables use uniform corners rather than the asymmetric accent-shape treatment.
Charts and tables use uniform corners rather than the asymmetric accent-shape treatment.

rules.intent: Create the modern, optimistic brand container treatment.
rules.rule_text: Use the Brand Accent Shape—a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii and slight radii on the other two corners—to house callout text and photography.

quotes: Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).

rules.intent: Preserve the approved print implementation of the accent-shape geometry.
rules.rule_text: In print, Brand Accent Shape containers must use the approved asymmetric radius pairs: 1.25" and 0.0625" for large containers or photos, 0.5" and 0.0625" for banners, and 0.4375" and 0.0625" for small callout boxes.

quotes: **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Maintain a consistent asymmetric accent-shape treatment throughout each email.
rules.rule_text: For email Brand Accent Shapes, use the approved asymmetric large-container, banner, and callout radius treatments (for example, large containers use 120px and 6px). Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair and the slight radius to the other; retain one diagonal orientation across all sections in an email, defaulting to large radii at top-left and bottom-right.

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Keep data-display containers distinct from the brand accent-shape device.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables are an exception to the asymmetric Brand Accent Shape: they must use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (12px), not the asymmetric accent shape.

- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. - **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.rule_text:
The Brand Accent Shape (core container device) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

|---|---|

Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right). |
| Exception | charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.] |
